slides.title: One of the *biggest diet levers* is simple.
slides.sub: Cutting back on ultra-processed food may move your health more than any single superfood. No perfection required.

slides.title: Less of the ultra-processed
slides.body: Reducing ultra-processed food is *one of the biggest levers* for longevity. It often beats chasing any single superfood.

slides.title: Built to overeat
slides.body: These foods are *engineered to be overeaten* and are linked to worse health outcomes. The packaging hides how much you eat.

slides.title: Aim for most of the time
slides.body: You do not need perfection. Just *shift toward whole foods* most of the time, and let the occasional treat be a treat.

slides.title: Read past the front
slides.body: Health claims on the front of the box sell. *Read the ingredient list instead*, where the real story sits.

slides.title: Cooking does the work
slides.body: Cooking a little more at home *does most of the work* on its own. Simple meals quietly crowd out the processed stuff.

slides.title: Track the food choices that *add up*.
slides.body: Vibe Health scores your food alongside sleep, water and steps, so eating more whole foods shows up in one daily Health Score.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
Cutting back on ultra-processed food is one of the biggest diet levers for longevity, often bigger than any single superfood. 🥦

These foods are engineered to overeat, so shift toward whole foods most of the time, read past the claims on the box, and cook a little more at home. No perfection needed. Save this. 🔖

Vibe Health turns your food and habits into one daily score → link in bio.
youtube_title: Why Cutting Ultra-Processed Food Is a Top Diet Lever
